name: bootstrap-ghost
description: Mobile-first Bootstrap 5.3 theme for Ghost built for the Paso Robles Democratic Club. Locally vendored assets, responsive cards, zero CDN dependencies. Features configurable color schemes, Ghost Portal integration, Google Calendar sidebar, and featured post carousel.

color_scheme.description: Choose a colour palette for the site.

color_mode.description: Light forces the chosen scheme; Dark inverts it; Auto follows the visitor's OS preference.

type_scale.description: Affects base font size and line-height.

post_card_layout.description: How post cards are displayed in feed and archive pages.

show_sidebar.description: Show the right-hand sidebar on the home page.

show_calendar.description: Show the Google Calendar agenda block in the sidebar.

calendar_source_url.description: Google Calendar ID for the events calendar (without the full URL).

show_ghost_portal.description: Show the Ghost Portal signup button (bottom-right corner).

show_publication_cover.description: Show the hero banner on the home page.

show_featured_section.description: Show the rotating Featured carousel on the home page.

carousel_interval_seconds.description: How often the featured carousel rotates.

newsletter_cta_heading.description: Heading text for the newsletter signup CTA in the sidebar.

newsletter_cta_description.default: New posts, in your inbox — most Tuesdays.
newsletter_cta_description.description: Description text for the newsletter signup CTA.

newsletter_cta_disclaimer.default: No spam, no tracking. Unsubscribe in one click.
newsletter_cta_disclaimer.description: Disclaimer text below the newsletter description.

newsletter_cta_button_text.description: Text for the newsletter signup button.

newsletter_cta_button_action.description: What happens when the subscriber clicks the CTA button.

newsletter_cta_button_url.description: URL to open when 'Custom link' is selected (opens in a new tab).
